overview:
## Return Value

A new rule object.

## Discussion

Rules created using this method can run arbitrary code in their predicate and action, but do not encode their predicate or action when archiving with the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSKeyedArchiver] class. For archivable rules, use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRule] methods listed in Creating Data-Driven Rules.

# init(blockPredicate:action:)

**Initializer**

Creates a rule whose predicate is evaluated and action is executed through the specified blocks.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init(blockPredicate predicate: @escaping (GKRuleSystem) -> Bool, action: @escaping (GKRuleSystem) -> Void)
```

## Parameters

- **action**: A block to be invoked after the rule’s predicate is satisfied. The block takes a single parameter:



## Return Value

A new rule object.

## Discussion

Rules created using this method can run arbitrary code in their predicate and action, but do not encode their predicate or action when archiving with the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSKeyedArchiver] class. For archivable rules, use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRule] methods listed in Creating Data-Driven Rules.
title: init(blockPredicate:action:)
